name: Jade Morin
behaviour: Follows her gut over a plan; the best things in her life have been unplanned.
communication_style: breezy and warm, moves between topics like a breeze
relationship_goals: a partner who matches her freedom and doesn't try to cage it
background: Last stable address: Paris, three years ago. Currently Medellín. Works 20 hours a week and spends the rest exploring. Has excellent taste and no fixed plans.
